use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in authentication forms and sign-in flows
Form submission triggers with loading states for async operations
Navigation action triggers with icon support for visual cues
Accessible interactive elements with keyboard navigation and focus management
Customizable action buttons with multiple visual variants for different hierarchy levels
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style button component with CVA-powered variant system supporting multiple visual styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Features Radix UI Slot for composition, loading states, icon support, and accessible focus-visible states. Designed as a reusable atomic component for any UI requiring interactive action triggers.
